message:
test(wasm): expand JS exports coverage and ascension closure contract tests

- tests/wasm_js_exports_coverage_contract.rs: Major expansion (~200 lines)
  adding comprehensive tests for the new Browser Edition SDK surface —
  verifies all public exports from @asupersync/browser, @asupersync/react,
  and @asupersync/next packages are documented, typed, and match the
  expected API surface. Validates React hook signatures, Next.js adapter
  exports, and tracing subpath availability.

- tests/runtime_ascension_closure_packet_contract.rs: Expand contract
  tests with browser-specific launch gate assertions, host I/O readiness
  checks, and storage/stream capability verification in the ascension
  closure packet.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: Update issue tracker with progress on Browser
  Edition SDK implementation, host I/O wiring, and contract test expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
